title: Subscribe to our new status page
excerpt:
Follow the operational status of our platform as well as other key features and services on this page. 
Subscribe to updates to receive email notifications whenever monday.​com creates, updates or resolves an incident.

posts.author: Ron (Ron Rafalovitch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Follow the operational status of our platform as well as other key features and services on this page.

Subscribe to updates to receive email notifications whenever monday.​com creates, updates or resolves an incident.
